tasks.subject: Task 0: Throttle helper + configx additions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the per-factor exponential-backoff helper and configx additions.

**Files:** pkg/authn/throttle.go (new) + test, pkg/configx/configx.go (modify), pkg/authn/errors.go (modify — add ErrFactorLocked)

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/authn/... ./pkg/configx/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/authn/throttle.go", "pkg/authn/throttle_test.go", "pkg/configx/configx.go", "pkg/authn/errors.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/authn/... ./pkg/configx/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Throttle CheckLocked/RegisterFailure/Reset implemented", "configx.Auth substruct added", "password_hash.parallelism default = 1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Audit writer body
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace dbWriter.Record no-op body with real InsertCredentialEvent call.

**Files:** pkg/audit/event.go (modify), pkg/audit/event_test.go (new)

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/audit/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/audit/event.go", "pkg/audit/event_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/audit/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Record marshals Detail to JSONB", "Record converts IP", "Record handles nil account ID"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Password store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Argon2id PHC pipeline — hash, verify (re-hash on params upgrade), set, delete, dummy-verify. Also exports HashRaw/VerifyRaw/DefaultParams for recovery-code reuse.

**Files:** pkg/credential/password/phc.go (new) + test, pkg/credential/password/password.go (modify), pkg/credential/password/password_test.go (new)

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/credential/password/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/credential/password/phc.go", "pkg/credential/password/phc_test.go", "pkg/credential/password/password.go", "pkg/credential/password/password_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/credential/password/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PHC encode/decode round-trip", "Verify returns ErrPasswordIncorrect on mismatch", "Re-hash on params upgrade", "Throttle integration", "HashRaw/VerifyRaw exported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: TOTP store + recovery codes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RFC 6238 TOTP with AES-256-GCM at-rest secrets + 80-bit recovery codes.

**Files:** pkg/credential/totp/{code,aead,recovery}.go + tests, pkg/credential/totp/totp.go (modify), pkg/credential/totp/totp_test.go (new), pkg/authn/errors.go (add ErrRecoveryCodeInvalid)

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/credential/totp/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/credential/totp/code.go", "pkg/credential/totp/aead.go", "pkg/credential/totp/recovery.go", "pkg/credential/totp/totp.go", "pkg/credential/totp/totp_test.go", "pkg/authn/errors.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/credential/totp/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RFC 6238 Appendix B vectors pass", "AES-GCM with row-bound AAD", "Last-step replay rejected", "10 recovery codes (80 bits each) minted on first verify", "RegenerateRecoveryCodes wipes + mints"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Authn flow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real AvailableMethods + DisableNonWebAuthnFallbacks bodies.

**Files:** pkg/authn/flow.go (modify), pkg/authn/flow_test.go (new)

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/authn/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/authn/flow.go", "pkg/authn/flow_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/authn/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AvailableMethods returns correct subset", "Unconfirmed TOTP excluded", "DisableNonWebAuthnFallbacks deletes all three rowsets"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Login HTTP endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /auth/password/begin, /auth/totp/verify, /auth/recovery-code/verify with partial-session token in KV; username-enumeration-resistant.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_auth_password.go (new) + test, pkg/server/server.go (modify), pkg/authn/errors.go (modify)

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_auth_password.go", "pkg/server/handle_auth_password_test.go", "pkg/server/server.go", "pkg/authn/errors.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Unknown-username 401 with timing parity", "Partial token single-use", "amr correctly set on issued session", "All three login endpoints mounted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Sudo extension (3 methods)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend sudo to accept webauthn|password_totp|recovery_code. Add GET /me/sudo/methods.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_sudo.go (modify), pkg/server/handle_sudo_test.go (new), pkg/server/server.go (modify)

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_sudo.go", "pkg/server/handle_sudo_test.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/me/sudo/methods exposes enrolled methods", "begin accepts method param", "complete dispatches per stashed method", "sudo_granted audit event recorded with method"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: /me sensitive endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /me/password/set, /me/totp/begin|verify, /me/recovery-codes/regenerate, /me/auth/revoke-password-totp. All sudo-gated.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_me_password.go, handle_me_totp.go, handle_me_revoke_pwd_totp.go (new), pkg/server/server.go (modify)

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_me_password.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_totp.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_revoke_pwd_totp.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["password/set sudo-gated + length check", "totp begin/verify returns secret + recovery codes once", "regenerate wipes + mints", "revoke-password-totp idempotent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: cmd/smoke v0.2 extension
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add steps 18–46 (~28 new) to cmd/smoke/main.go. Full v0.2 coverage against live dev server + PG.

**Files:** cmd/smoke/main.go (modify), pkg/credential/totp/code.go (expose ComputeCodeForTesting)

**Verify:** `mise exec -- go run ./cmd/smoke -username smoke3-admin -display "Smoke3 Admin"` → 46/46

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go", "pkg/credential/totp/code.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go run ./cmd/smoke -username smoke3-admin -display \"Smoke3 Admin\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["46/46 steps green", "DB assertions all pass", "Throttle 429 observed", "All three sudo methods exercised"]}
```
